pages.name: GuestBooking-Step1-Name
pages.description: Step 1: Guest enters their name before picking available times

children.name: HelperText
children.text: No account needed. Just enter your name and select when you are available.

pages.name: GuestBooking-Step2-PickTimes
pages.description: Step 2: Calendar grid where the guest drags to select available times

children.name: InstructionText
children.text: Drag to select when you're available, then confirm below

pages.name: GuestBooking-Step3-Success
pages.description: Step 3: Celebration screen after submitting availability

children.name: ThanksText
children.text: Thanks for contributing to the planning of Weekly Team Standup!

children.name: SavedText
children.text: Your availability has been saved. The organizer will pick the best time.

children.name: NextDesc
children.text: The organizer has a recommended next step for you

children.name: ExploreDesc
children.text: Discover how teams find meeting times and stay in sync
